document: A retrieval segment identifies the governing entity. A tracing segment connects that entity to a downstream decision. The paper argues that cache preserves exact evidence while write captures diffuse cross-chunk dependencies. Mixed slices require both because one substrate alone leaves residual error.
answers: cache preserves exact evidence and write captures diffuse dependencies

document: The benchmark combines retrieval and aggregation signals. The plan preregisters mixed slices before any result inspection, so later success cannot be attributed to cherry-picking favorable combinations. This protects the allocation-law claim from post hoc slice editing.
